---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="visual-detail">

  <a href="../3-visuals.html" class="back-link">← Back to Visuals</a>

  <h2 class="visual-title">European Rivers — Minimal Map</h2>

  <div class="visual-detail-media">
    <img src="../images/visuals/rivers_europe_minimal.png" alt="European rivers minimal"/>
  </div>

  <div class="visual-meta">
    <p class="visual-desc">A minimal cartographic rendering of the entire European river network using the HydroRIVERS dataset. No political boundaries — only the river lines, drawn in a single blue tone against a white background, revealing the continent's drainage patterns.</p>
    <table class="visual-info">
      <tr><td class="meta-label">Tools</td><td>Python · GeoPandas · Matplotlib</td></tr>
      <tr><td class="meta-label">Context</td><td>#30DayMapChallenge 2025 · Day: Minimal</td></tr>
      <tr><td class="meta-label">Data</td><td>HydroRIVERS (Lehner & Grill, 2013)</td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
.visual-detail {
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 1rem 1rem 3rem 1rem;
}
.back-link {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  color: #e8a020 !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.back-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}
.visual-title {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  color: #e8a020 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.visual-detail-media img,
.visual-detail-media video {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  display: block;
}
.visual-meta {
  margin-top: 1.8rem;
}
.visual-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #333;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  text-align: justify;
}
.visual-info {
  border: none;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.visual-info td {
  padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem 0.4rem 0;
  border: none;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.meta-label {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #94805c;
  white-space: nowrap;
  width: 80px;
}
</style>
```
